response.justification: While Sarah demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and has worked on complex, large-scale systems, she lacks the specific technical expertise required for this role. Her Java experience is outdated (last significant work in 2016-2018), with no Spring ecosystem experience and only dated IDE work (LabWindows/CVI in 2015). For a mid-senior individual contributor role requiring deep JVM and enterprise framework knowledge to drive end-to-end feature ownership, this gap is too significant to overcome without substantial ramp-up time.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with demonstrated expertise in TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, and building maintainable systems across multiple complex projects
Proven ability to work on large-scale systems including microservices infrastructure and real-time data processing handling millions of requests per second
Current experience with developer tooling (MCP code generators and agentic frameworks) and 11-year history of open-source contributions showing technical depth and initiative
concerns: Java expertise is outdated (8+ years since last significant Java work at Altom) with no Kotlin experience, which are core requirements for this JVM-focused role
Completely lacks Spring ecosystem experience and other required enterprise frameworks (Quarkus, Hibernate), which are explicitly stated qualifications
IDE/language tooling experience is limited and dated; only prior IDE work was LabWindows/CVI in C (2014-2015), not the modern JVM tooling this role demands

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling background & software craftsmanship focus
